subcodes.title: Words to an Indian scholar, spoken on 1914-03-19
subcodes.first_line: Just as you are a servant of God I am also the servant of God. I am the absolute servant of the Almighty without implication or interpretation.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @oneness; unity of religion, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated, @knowledge; recognition of God
